item.title: Fiscal hawk or big spender – what kind of chancellor will John Healey be?
item.summary: Diligent, popular, unexpected pick for the Treasury has been given a straitjacket – and the job of funding PM’s policy promises UK politics live – latest updates On the frequent occasions that John Healey would travel abroad as defence secretary, he was so determined to keep working he would get the crew to tether a desk to the inside of his military aircraft so he could read his papers. His diligence is one reason why Andy Burnham, the new prime minister, made Healey his unexpected pick for chancellor on Monday. Allies say others include their shared commitment to re-industrialisation and devolution. Continue reading...
